name: Charlotte of Asian Ratatouille (Hl)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the zucchini, yellow squash, eggplant, red pepper, and green pepper into small cubes (brunoise).
2. In a large pan, sauté the chopped vegetables with ginger and garlic until they are crisp-tender.
3. Add soy sauce and oyster sauce to the vegetables and stir until well combined.
4. Place a ring mold in the center of a plate.
5. Cut the asparagus into halves lengthwise and shape them to fit inside the ring mold.
6. Fill the mold with the Asian Ratatouille mixture.
7. Securely tie the chive around the mold to finish.
Yield: 1 serving
Nutritional information: 221 calories, 2 grams of fat.
